description: Matrix Apparels Ltd. is a 100% export-oriented knit and woven garments manufacturing facility based in Dhaka, Bangladesh, built to deliver flexible, quality-driven retail programs for EU, UK and U.S. markets.
With an integrated production setup covering sampling, cutting, sewing and finishing, the factory ensures consistent performance across both knit and woven product categories.

Positioned as a model factory within the Matrix Platform, the unit also operates as a dedicated R&D and product development hub — where new styles are engineered, tested and refined before bulk production.
A large, specialized sample development section supported by skilled technicians enables fast prototyping, extended sampling capacity and precise execution across multiple product categories.

The factory is particularly strong in handling fashion-forward and fancy items with low MOQ requirements, offering flexibility that supports buyer-specific developments, trend-driven collections and quick market testing.
Designed for agility and efficiency, Matrix Apparels supports medium-scale programs with controlled lead time, flexibility and reliable delivery from concept to final shipment.
strengths: Knit and woven garment manufacturing capability
Dedicated R&D and product engineering hub for Matrix Platform
Large sample development unit with extended sampling capacity
Strong capability in fashion and fancy product development
Flexible MOQ starting from 500 pcs per style
Monthly capacity of ~200,000 pieces
Ability to handle multi-category product development
Skilled workforce supporting precision and flexibility

contact.hq: Bir Muktijoddha DM Ramiz Uddin Road 55/1, Borua Rajpara, Khilkhet, Dhaka- 1229, Bangladesh

description: IFS TEXWEAR (PVT.) LTD. is a fully integrated composite knit manufacturing facility built to deliver high-volume, precision-driven retail programs for EU, UK and U.S. markets.

With complete in-house control across knitting, dyeing, printing, cutting, sewing and finishing, the factory ensures consistent performance across jersey, fleece and essential knit categories at scale.
Powered by advanced European and Japanese machinery and supported by a structured multi-department management system, every stage is aligned for efficiency, accuracy and on-time delivery.
Operating within an expansive 268.35K sq. ft. facility, IFS is equipped to handle large-scale production with full reliability from fabric development to final global dispatch.
A dedicated quality, compliance and safety-driven infrastructure ensure traceability, consistency and buyer confidence across all programs.
strengths: Composite vertical integration from knitting, dyeing and garment production
120 specialized sewing lines with 2,00,000 pcs/day capacity
Knitting: 35 ton/day (Average)
Dyeing: 30 ton/day (Average)
In-house printing capability supporting value-added programs
Advanced machinery from Germany, Italy and Japan
Structured 16-department production and management system
4,500+ skilled workforce ensuring stable, high-volume production
Dedicated sampling and development support for buyer programs
Proven export presence across EU, UK, USA and global markets
100% safety-compliant and audit-ready facility

description: MB Knit Fashion Ltd. is a 100% export-oriented knit garment manufacturing facility with a long-standing track record in delivering consistent, high-volume retail programs for EU, UK and U.S. markets. Established in 1992, the factory operates from a 90,974 sq. ft. facility with a structured production setup designed for quality, efficiency and timely delivery.

Operating with integrated garment production and strong backward linkage support, MB Knit ensures stable performance across jersey, fleece and essential knit categories. The facility is backed by modern machinery, established compliance systems and a dedicated quality-driven infrastructure that supports reliability from raw material sourcing to final shipment.

Supported by partner composite facilities for fabric, dyeing, printing and finishing, MB Knit combines in-house garment strength with extended backward linkage capability — allowing flexibility, consistency and dependable execution across buyer programs.
strengths: Established operation since 1992 with proven export experience
Factory space of 90,974 sq. ft. with structured production flow
48 production lines with average monthly capacity of ~1.41M pcs
Capacity mix: Basic 2.187M pcs, Semi-Critical 0.9M pcs, Critical 0.7M pcs/month
1,115+ manpower supporting stable production output
754 machines including Juki, Pegasus, Brother and Hikari
In-house cutting supported by CAD marker, pattern cutter and scanner
Strong backward linkage through partner composite, dyeing, printing and finishing units
Lead time structure of 45–90 days depending on program complexity
Dedicated sample section supporting fast development and style execution

contact.hq: B/164-166 & B/185-187 BSCIC I/E, Fatullah,Narayanganj, Bangladesh

description: Lithe Apparels is a vertically integrated knit manufacturing facility built to deliver high-volume, quality-driven retail programs for EU, UK and U.S. markets.

With complete in-house control across knitting, dyeing, finishing, printing, cutting and garment production, the factory ensures consistent performance across jersey, fleece and loungewear categories at scale.
The facility operates with a fully implemented FAMKAM ERP system, enabling real-time production monitoring, TNA control and efficiency tracking across all stages.
Lithe is also experienced in handling licensed and branded product programs, ensuring strict compliance with brand requirements, quality standards and execution precision.
A dedicated quality, AQL and compliance team supports each line ensuring full traceability and reliability from yarn to final dispatch.
strengths: Full vertical integration from knitting to garment
Knitting: 50 high-speed machines with ~18 tons/day capacity
Dyeing: 1,650 tons/month bulk capacity with 44 machines
Finishing: 65 tons/day processing capacity with advanced European machinery
AOP (All Over Print): 20 tons/day bulk + 250 kg sample capacity
Screen Print: ~300K pcs/day capacity with in-house setup
Cutting: 7 auto spreaders, 2 auto cutters, 18 cutting tables
Production scale: 117 lines with ~4M pcs/month capacity
Workforce: 5,700+ skilled manpower ensuring stable output
Real-time ERP-based production and efficiency monitoring
Proven export track record across EU, UK and USA
Experience in licensed and branded product manufacturing

contact.hq: Lithe Complex, Asian Highway, Sanarpar, Siddhirgonj, Narayanganj, Bangladesh

description: West Knitwear Ltd. is a vertically integrated knit manufacturing facility established in 1996, built to deliver high-volume, quality-driven retail programs for EU, UK and North American markets.
With complete in-house control across knitting, dyeing, cutting, sewing and finishing, the factory ensures consistent performance across jersey, fleece and essential knit categories at scale.
Supported by strong backward integration and a structured production environment, the facility is designed to deliver efficiency, stability and flexibility across large-volume programs.
A dedicated quality system, advanced machinery and disciplined process flow ensure reliable output, traceability and on-time delivery from yarn to final shipment.
strengths: Established operation since 1996 with strong export experience
40 production lines with 1.8–2.0M pcs/month capacity

description: Aitken Spence Apparel is a global sustainability leader and the first company in Sri Lanka to be recognized among the Top Global 100 Companies for Sustainability 2022.

Operating as a trusted export-oriented manufacturer since 1977, the company delivers end-to-end apparel solutions through a vertically integrated platform including advanced circular knit production facilities.
Powered by a 3,000+ workforce and over 3,000 machines across a 300,000+ sq. ft. manufacturing footprint, Aitken Spence ensures operational excellence, quality consistency and scalable production.

The facility is engineered for speed and technical precision, offering rapid 3-day sample development, supported by advanced 3D pattern facilities and CLO 3D visualization, enabling efficient product development for global retail partners.
strengths: Sustainability leader recognized in Top Global 100 Companies (2022)
Carbon neutral certified manufacturing operations
Annual production capacity of up to 24 million pieces
5 million SAH production capability
Specialized circular knit cut-and-sew production facilities
In-house value-added services: – Embroidery: ~1.5M pcs/year – Printing: ~600K pcs/year – Garment washing: ~6M pcs/year
Advanced digital product development with CLO 3D and 3D pattern systems
Rapid sample development with ~3-day lead time
Structured production supporting ~75-day lead time for local fabric programs
Strong capability in licensed and branded programs (e.g. Disney, Lacoste)

description: Zhejiang Monalisa Textile Co., Ltd. is a fully integrated textile manufacturing platform specializing in fabric R&D, weaving, knitting, dyeing, printing and post-finishing for global apparel supply chains.
With over 20 years of industry experience and annual sales reaching 800 million yuan, the company operates a complete textile ecosystem — from raw fiber to finished fabric.

Supported by multiple specialized production units across China and international locations, Monalisa ensures speed, flexibility and consistent quality across high-volume fabric programs serving EU, UK and U.S. markets.
A dedicated R&D team drives continuous innovation, developing new fabrics regularly to align with global fashion trends and buyer requirements.
strengths: Fully integrated textile platform from fiber to finished fabric
Monthly capacity of ~3 million meters across multiple units
Weaving (Wangxing): ~1M meters/month with 350+ looms
Knitting (Maoxin): 180 machines with ~1,600 tons/month capacity
Dyeing & Finishing (Xinyi): ~2,400 tons/month with 50+ dye vats
Global Unit (Ethiopia): 160 machines with ~48 tons/day capacity
In-house rotary printing capability for large-scale production
Multi-factory setup ensuring scalability and supply stability
800+ workforce supporting stable production operations
Strong in-house R&D enabling continuous product innovation
categories: Fashion & Silky Fabrics (Crepe, Chiffon, Voile, Satin, Twill, Jacquard)
Knitted Blends (Cotton, Viscose, Modal, Rayon, Spandex mixes)
